Usage:
  circleci auth [command]

Available Commands:
  id          Show the device ID for this CLI installation
  login       Log in to a CircleCI account
  logout      Log out of a CircleCI account
  me          Display active account information
  signup      Sign-up for a new CircleCI account

Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected

Use "circleci auth [command] --help" for more information about a command.
